headlines.headline: Crevol Retail Group reports record quarterly revenue, up 5% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 5% indicates strong operational performance and positive momentum for the company.

headlines.headline: Crevol Retail Group warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Middle East operations

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co Chief Strategy Officer steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a C-suite executive introduces leadership instability and uncertainty regarding strategic direction.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
